# Network Privacy Institute

Network Privacy Institute (NPI) is an independent initiative dedicated to strengthening privacy-preserving internet infrastructure, digital rights, and online anonymity.

## Mission

We believe privacy is essential for a free and open society. Our mission is to support public-interest technology that protects privacy, security, and freedom of expression online.

## Current Focus

Our first project is operating and maintaining Tor relays to contribute bandwidth, resilience, and decentralization to the Tor network.

## Goals

* Launch and maintain reliable Tor relays
* Publish transparency reports
* Promote privacy-enhancing technologies
* Support internet freedom and digital rights

## Get Involved

We welcome supporters, contributors, researchers, and volunteers who share our mission.

Website: https://networkprivacyinstitute.org

## Transparency

We are committed to openness regarding infrastructure, funding, governance, and operational activities.
